message.content:
- [Technical Checks]
  - Ensure WordPress or CMS is up-to-date
  - Install and configure SSL certificate
  - Update .htaccess file for best performance
  - Install a caching plugin
  - Set up a custom 404 error page
  - Configure a maintenance mode page
  - Test website speed with tools like PageSpeed Insights
  - Test site navigation and links
  - Enable and configure WordPress performance plugins
  - Check and optimize image sizes
  - Enable and configure error logging
  - Install a security plugin and configure
  - Set up a DNS caching lookaside
- [SEO Checks]
  - Install and configure Google Search Console
  - Use aYoast SEO plugin to configure meta tags, og tags, and titles
  - Set up the XML sitemap
  - Verify the site’s property in Bing Webmaster Tools
  - Check for duplicate content and fix or canonicalize
  - Ensure consistent URL structure
  - Implement URL redirection for old pages
  - Use header tags appropriately (H1, H2, H3)
  - Optimize for mobile and test with Mobile-Friendly Test
  - Use alt tags for images
  - Create an XML sitemap and submit to search engines
  - Ensure proper sitemap.xml and robots.txt
- [Legal Checks]
  - Register the domain name
  - Check for trademark issues
  - Ensure privacy policy is up-to-date and in compliance
  - Add GDPR compliant cookie policy if needed
  - Confirm HTTPS enforcement is complete
  - Review and update terms of service
  - Ensure content complies with state and federal laws
  - Obtain all necessary business permits and licenses
  - Check for any legal obligations related to data handling
- [Content Checks]
  - Create a clear and concise mission statement
  - Develop a style guide for consistent branding
  - Write SEO-friendly and engaging content
  - Use keyword-rich alt text for images
  - Ensure all pages have a unique and relevant title
  - Create a content map for organization
  - Localize content if targeting multiple regions/languages
  - Ensure all forms have clear and descriptive labels
  - Place internal and external links strategically
  - Embed high-quality images and videos
  - Check for broken links throughout the site
  - Write concise and informative blog posts
  - Include a contact form for customer inquiries
